title: Sealapack Food And Freezer Bags, Resealable & Reuseable Pack Of 35 Bags
features: FILL, EAT, REPEAT: Sealapack Re-useable Food and Freezer Bags have a locking press sea to ensure freshness. Safe to store food, freeze leftovers or securely marinate fish, meat or vegetables.

EFFICIENT STORAGE, REDUCE FOOD WASTE: Freezers are often under used, make the most of these bags and reduce food waste, chop and freeze overripe fruit to quickly make a smoothie or fruit compote. Wash, chop and store excess vegetables and fresh herbs. Freeze leftovers and sauces once cooled
BULK BUY: Larger pack sizes of fresh meat, or fish can easily be separated into portions in each bag, ready to seal and freeze
TIME SAVING: Add a marinade to fish or meat, tumble chopped vegetables in herbs, seal and freeze to save time prep for future meals
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: BOX OF 35 REUSEABLE BAGS
description: Product Description Sealapack Reuseable Freezer Bags have a locking press seal, to ensure freshness. Freezers are often under used, make the most of these bags and reduce food waste, chop and freeze over-ripe fruit to quickly make a smoothie or fruit compote. Wash, chop and store excess vegetables and fresh herbs. Freeze leftovers and sauces once cooled.
